<think> I know that Richard Berry is a singer and songwriter, and I have knowledge about his work. The album "The First Four Years" is a compilation of songs by Richard Berry. I need to find out which song from this album was written by Richard Berry. I recall that Richard Berry is known for writing the song "Louie, Louie", which is a classic rock and roll song. I also know that "Louie, Louie" is included in the album "The First Four Years". Therefore, I can conclude that the song from the album "The First Four Years" written by Richard Berry is "Louie, Louie".</think>
<answer> Louie, Louie </answer>
